free_text: Yields of radioactive nuclides formed by bombardment
of  a thick target with 22-MeV deuterons
data were used from this article
No information on source of uncertainties
BIB section was updated. Correction was
made in Reference code, according to N.Otsuka remarks
and in all Subentries, according to new EXFOR rules.
SD: DATA units were returned to original
(DPS/MUAHR -> MBQ/MUAHR) and SF8=DT -> PHY in REACTION
code in Subents 002-209. RAD-DET deleted from
SD: REACTION code was updated in
